steps: Verify initial command-post ledger shows no command-post penalty and no warning card
Start battle, enable command queue, queue five selected-brigade commands, issue, run briefly, withdraw
Open After Action and apply result
Verify next-battle command-post warning appears before starting battle
Check console, images, horizontal overflow, NaN, then reset QA campaign and viewport
